subcodes.first_line: O true friend! Praise be to God that thou art confirmed in service, and with sincerity and trustworthiness dost adorn the throne of sovereignty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوست حقیقی حمد خدا را که بخدمت موفقی و بصداقت و امانت بسریر سلطنت تاجداری
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @prayer for governments and rulers, @praise and encouragement
